audit_items.proof_trace: Domain separator RANDOM_CHALLENGE_KZG_CELL_BATCH_DOMAIN is hardcoded in the external c-kzg-4844 v2.1.1 library (C implementation), not in Prysm's Go codebase. Prysm correctly delegates all cell KZG proof batch verification to ckzg4844.VerifyCellKZGProofBatch without implementing custom cryptographic logic. Auditing external cryptographic library implementation is out-of-scope for Prysm code audit.
